paper_file: Fischer-Pauzenberger et al. - 2018 - OntoREA Accounting and Finance Model Including Option Contracts in the MDD-Context.md

result.paper_id: OntoREA© Accounting and Finance Model: Including Option Contracts in the MDD-Context

evidence_quotes.quote: In the model driven development (MDD) context [3] this model constitutes the platform specific model (PSM) which is derived from the platform independent model (PIM) in form of the OntoREA© model.

The research objective of this article is to provide the proof that the conceptual OntoREA© PIM model incorporates not only the static but also the dynamic hedge portfolio representation of derivative instruments.
The applicability of the proposed database PSM model was demonstrated for a European stock call running example.

goals.justification: The paper explicitly states that the OntoREA© model serves as the PIM from which a PSM is derived in the MDD context, and that the model's validity is demonstrated through the construction and application of a refined database PSM. This constitutes active use in system development, satisfying the 'For Intervening' criterion.

evidence_quotes.quote: The research objective of this article is to provide the proof that the conceptual OntoREA© PIM model incorporates not only the static but also the dynamic hedge portfolio representation of derivative instruments.
In this sense the research objective is reached by delivering the missing proof in [1] in form of a refined database PSM that covers unconditional as well as conditional derivatives.

goals.justification: The model is used to identify and resolve a gap in prior work (lack of proof for dynamic hedge portfolios), and the paper frames the development of the refined PSM as a solution to this problem, satisfying the 'For Problem-solving' criterion.

evidence_quotes.quote: This proposed model can be useful for business analysts in the finance domain as well as for teaching purposes by explaining derivative instruments in form of conceptual PIM and database specific PSM models.

goals.justification: The paper explicitly states that the model supports communication with business analysts and learners, indicating its use in explaining complex concepts across stakeholder groups, which aligns with 'For Communicating'. The context suggests explanation and alignment, not just documentation.

evidence_quotes.quote: This proposed model can be useful for business analysts in the finance domain as well as for teaching purposes by explaining derivative instruments in form of conceptual PIM and database specific PSM models.

uncertain_goals.reason: While the model is said to be useful for teaching and business analysts, the text does not indicate that it is used as a persistent reference or knowledge base for asynchronous communication; the primary purpose is explanatory and instructional, not archival.

evidence_quotes.quote: In the model driven development (MDD) context [3] this model constitutes the platform specific model (PSM) which is derived from the platform independent model (PIM) in form of the OntoREA© model.
The applicability of the proposed database PSM model was demonstrated for a European stock call running example.
After having presented the construction of the MySQL database PIM its working is addressed.
evidence_quotes.section: 3 Hedge Portfolio: Switching from PIM- to PSM-Level

goals.justification: The refined MySQL PSM is explicitly described as the PSM derived from the PIM in the MDD context, and its functionality is demonstrated through a running example involving dynamic pricing and event triggering. This shows active use in system implementation, satisfying 'For Intervening'.

evidence_quotes.quote: The research objective of this article is to provide the proof that the conceptual OntoREA© PIM model incorporates not only the static but also the dynamic hedge portfolio representation of derivative instruments.
In this sense the research objective is reached by delivering the missing proof in [1] in form of a refined database PSM that covers unconditional as well as conditional derivatives.

goals.justification: The refined PSM is developed specifically to solve the problem of proving the dynamic hedge portfolio representation in the PIM, which was missing in prior work. The model is used to evaluate and validate the PIM, satisfying 'For Problem-solving'.

evidence_quotes.quote: This proposed model can be useful for business analysts in the finance domain as well as for teaching purposes by explaining derivative instruments in form of conceptual PIM and database specific PSM models.

goals.justification: The paper states the model is useful for business analysts and teaching, implying its use in explaining complex financial concepts across different groups, which aligns with 'For Communicating'. The context suggests explanation and alignment, not just documentation.

evidence_quotes.quote: This proposed model can be useful for business analysts in the finance domain as well as for teaching purposes by explaining derivative instruments in form of conceptual PIM and database specific PSM models.

uncertain_goals.reason: Although the model is said to be useful for teaching and business analysts, the text does not indicate it is used as a persistent reference or knowledge base for asynchronous communication; the primary purpose is explanatory and instructional, not archival.
